zh.lifeSummary: 當Lydia Hathaway於大約1659年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯時，她的父親Arthur Hathaway30歲，母親Sarah Cooke25歲。她於1681年與James Sisson I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德波斯姆斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1714年6月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特享年56歲，埋葬在美國羅得島紐波特紐波特可蒙 格洛德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lydia Hathaway于大约1659年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯时，她的父亲Arthur Hathaway30岁，母亲Sarah Cooke25岁。她于1681年与James Sisson I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德波斯姆斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1714年6月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特享年56岁，埋葬在美国罗德岛州紐波特紐波特可蒙 格洛德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hathaway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Hatewi (Old English Heathuwīg), or from ancient Germanic Hathuwic, Hadewic, all ‘war’ + ‘war, battle’.
topographic name for someone who lived at or near a road across a heath, from Middle English he(a)th ‘heath’ + wei(e) ‘way’ (Old English hǣth + weg).

variants.name: Hardaway
meanings: English (London): probably a variant of   Hathaway  . This surname is now rare in Britain. In the US, this surname is concentrated in the south, in TX, TN, and GA.
Perhaps an Americanized form of German Hardeweg, a habitational name composed of ‘hard, paved’ + ‘way, road’.

variants.name: Hattaway
meanings: English: variant of   Hathaway  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Hathway
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Somerset): variant of   Hathaway  .

variants.name: Adaway
meanings: English: variant of Hathaway , with loss of initial H-.

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

historicEvents.description: The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

en.lifeSummary: When Lydia Hathaway was born about 1659, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Arthur Hathaway, was 30 and her mother, Sarah Cooke, was 25. She married James Sisson I in 1681, in Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 23 June 1714, in Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 56, and was buried in Common Ground Cemetery, Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lydia Hathaway est née environ 1659, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Arthur Hathaway, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sarah Cooke, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé James Sisson I en 1681, à Portsmouth, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 juin 1714, à Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Common Ground Cemetery, Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lydia Hathaway um 1659 in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arthur Hathaway 30 und ihre Mutter Sarah Cooke 25. Sie hat 1681 in Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America James Sisson I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Juni 1714 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America und wurde in Common Ground Cemetery, Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Hathaway è nata il circa 1659 nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Arthur Hathaway, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Sarah Cooke, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato James Sisson I nel 1681, nel Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 23 giugno 1714, nel Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Common Ground Cemetery, Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lydia Hathawayが約1659年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで生まれた時，父Arthur Hathawayは30歳，母Sarah Cookeは25歳であった。1681年にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドポルトスモウスでJames Sisson Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1714年6月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトで56歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトニュープオルトコンモン グロウンド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lydia Hathaway(이)가 대략 1659년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arthur Hathaway(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Cooke(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1681년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 포츠모우스에서 James Sisson I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1714년 6월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 뉴포트 코몬 그라운드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Hathaway nasceu aproximadamente 1659, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Arthur Hathaway, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Cooke, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com James Sisson I em 1681, em Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de junho de 1714, em Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Common Ground Cemetery, Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lydia Hathaway родилась около 1659 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Arthur Hathaway было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Cooke, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Sisson I в 1681 г. в местности порцмоут, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 23 июня 1714 г. в местности нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности коммон гроунд кеметири, нюпорт, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con James Sisson I en 1681, en Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas.
